response.justification: Strong 19-year engineering foundation with polyglot expertise across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems. However, the role demands demonstrated AI expertise and strategic customer advisory experience at director level. Candidate's AI involvement is very recent (re:cinq, 1+ month) and not yet substantiated by shipped products or strategic outcomes. Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI. Has entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) and leadership qualities (teaching, mentoring), but no evidence of the principal-level strategic platform work the role requires.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year minimum with 19 years of progressive engineering roles including Staff and Senior positions
Demonstrates teaching and thought leadership through workshops, conference talks, and community projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial libraries)
Polyglot technical versatility across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, DevOps) with strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: AI experience is nascent and unsubstantiated—recent role at re:cinq (1+ month) mentions AI-agent infrastructure but shows no shipped AI products, platforms, or strategic outcomes
No advanced degree in AI field and resume lacks recognized AI expertise or published work; no evidence of deep ML/AI domain knowledge required for principal-level AI strategy role

No demonstrated director-level strategic leadership—career shows technical excellence and mentorship but lacks evidence of advising strategic customers, identifying platform differentiation, or executing multi-team AI initiatives
